description_long: This object is a rectangular, vertically-oriented snack package with a series of alternating black and white horizontal stripes covering its broad faces. The sides are solid black, giving the package a bold, high-contrast appearance. The top and bottom surfaces are not visible, but the overall form suggests a sealed, box-like container typical for snack foods such as cookies, crackers, or bars. The package is tall and narrow, with a flat front and back, and no visible openings or interactive features. There are no visible brand logos, flavor indicators, or promotional graphics on any side. The design is minimalist, relying solely on the striped pattern for visual interest.
description: A tall, rectangular snack package with bold black and white horizontal stripes on the front and back, and solid black sides. The design is minimalist and lacks visible branding or graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full striped pattern of alternating black and white horizontal lines.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a solid black, featureless surface with no visible markings.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, displaying the same striped pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a solid black, unmarked surface.
